nasb.text: All who dwell on the earth will worship him, everyone whose name has not been written from the foundation of the world in the book of life of the Lamb who has been slain.

esv.text: and all who dwell on earth will worship it, everyone whose name has not been written before the foundation of the world in the book of life of the Lamb who was slain.

cnv.text: 所有住在地上的人，名字沒有記在創世以來被殺的羊羔之生命冊上的，都要拜牠。

ccb.text: 凡住在地上的人，就是从创世以来名字没有记在被杀羔羊的生命册上的，都会崇拜怪兽。

csbs.text: 住在地上的人，凡是名字从创世以来没有记在那被杀羔羊的生命册上的，都将膜拜它。
